headline: DBS Hits SGD 1 Billion in AI Economic Value — 2,000+ Models, World's Best AI Bank
summary: DBS achieved SGD 1 billion in economic value from AI initiatives in 2025, hitting its five-year target two years ahead of schedule, per Forrester analyst Tom Mouhsian (January 2026). The bank now operates over 2,000 AI models across 430+ use cases (FY2025 annual report), up from 600+ models in 2023. Global Finance named DBS the inaugural World's Best AI Bank in October 2025, citing its early and extensive model deployment, strong experimentation culture, and robust execution capabilities. DBS sends 45 million personalised nudges monthly to 5+ million customers using 100+ AI/ML algorithms analysing 15,000+ data points per customer (DBS Newsroom). Its AI credit risk models detect 95% of non-performing SME loans at least 3 months before credit stress, with 80% of at-risk borrowers successfully averted. CEO Tan Su Shan stated at Singapore Fintech Week: 'It's not hope. It's now. It's already happening.'
the_so_what: DBS's SGD 1 billion in verified AI economic value — confirmed by Forrester, not just a company projection — is the only independently validated, decision-grade AI ROI figure from any APAC wealth bank. Neither OCBC, UOB, nor Standard Chartered has published a comparable production model count or economic value estimate, making DBS the sole public benchmark for any wealth executive in the region sizing AI investment. The trajectory from SGD 180M (2022) to SGD 370M (2023) to SGD 750M (2024) to SGD 1B (2025) shows compounding returns that grow harder for late movers to match.

key_stat.label: AI economic value achieved in 2025, confirmed by Forrester (Jan 2026) — up from SGD 750M in 2024

capability_evidence.evidence: DBS operates 2,000+ AI models across 430+ use cases (FY2025 annual report). Sends 45M personalised nudges monthly using 100+ AI/ML algorithms. AI credit risk models detect 95% of NPLs 3 months early. SGD 1B economic value confirmed by Forrester.
capability_evidence.metric: 2,000+ AI models; SGD 1B economic value; 45M monthly personalised nudges

_research.whats_new: SGD 1B economic value independently confirmed by Forrester (Jan 2026). Model count updated from 1,500+ to 2,000+ (FY2025 annual report). Use cases updated from 370+ to 430+. iCoach GenAI coaching platform launched.
